session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_fetch_sessions.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_get_learn_sessions.py -v` and report results.
session.assistant: I'll execute the pytest command to run the specified test files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on three specific test files with verbose output

session.tool_result:
